TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hbun_kramay, title = Hbun_kramay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun_kramay} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun kramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hbun kramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ńßő≤un kramaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ńßő≤un kramaj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ńßő≤un kramaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ńßő≤un kramaj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na ńßő≤un kramaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ńßő≤un kramaj ńßja Ē …£a ńßő≤un-qramaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
